title: Figure 5 from: Samarakoon MC, Manawasinghe IS (2026) Additions to the Xylariomycetidae (Sordariomycetes) fungal flora from northern Thailand: four novel Amphisphaeria species. MycoKeys 132: 63-90. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.132.188390
author: Samarakoon, Milan C.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 5 Amphisphaeria sribuabanensis (MFLU 26-0122, holotype). a. Substrate; b, c. Ascomata in dead substrate (ascomata shown with white arrows); d. Vertical section through ascoma; e. Peridium; f. Vertical section through ostiolar canal; g. Paraphyses; h–k. Asci; l. Apical ring bluing in Melzer's reagent; m–u. Ascospores. Scale bars: 200 μm (d); 50 μm (f, h–k); 10 μm (e, g, l–u).
